framework.name: AIMS Component Architecture
framework.description: Six-component model: Agent Identifiers, Agent Credentials, Agent Attestation, Agent Credential Provisioning, Agent Authentication (transport + application layer via WIMSE Proof Tokens, HTTP Message Signatures), Agent Authorization (OAuth 2.0 delegation with Transaction Tokens for risk reduction). Includes human-in-the-loop, cross-domain access, and tool-to-service patterns.
framework.raw_quote: An Agent Identity Management System ensures that the right Agent has access to the right resources and tools at the right time for the right reason.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
